title: VulnHunter-Fix per-finding fix plan
description: Schema for the plan artifact produced by Phase 2 (Plan) per finding. Includes pre-classification (REQ-HON-002) and crypto_trust_chain (REQ-CWE-007) fields.

projected_completeness_tier.description: Terminal projection per REQ-HON-002. Compared against post-fix reclassification (REQ-HON-003); mismatch triggers repair loop.

projected_residual_vectors.description: Vectors that will remain open under this plan. Must be non-empty when projected tier != FULL.

callers_routed_coverage.description: SCH-2 / REQ-GRA-019: coverage of graph.callers_of(sink_symbol) by the plan's remediated call sites. `superset` = plan routes every caller through the safe pathway (required for FULL tier). `subset` = plan misses at least one caller (tier can be at most MITIGATION). `unknown` = graph backend was grep-only or symbol not resolvable. Read by scripts/compute-completeness-tier.py to gate the `full.callers_routed_through_fix` signal.

discrimination_evidence.description: SCH-2 backward-compat slot: worker results carry this on `result.discrimination_evidence`; the classifier reads there first. If a plan-phase producer chooses to emit it (rare), the classifier accepts it here too.

tier_judgment.description: Populated when the plan-phase classifier returned LLM_REVIEW and the bounded LLM fallback was invoked (REQ-HON-016).

crypto_trust_chain.description: Required for findings routed to worker_agent_crypto.md (REQ-CWE-007). Booleans lifted from the triage sidecar (REQ-CWE-008); the worker must not modify them.

adapter_language.description: Repo-type adapter selected in Phase 2 per REQ-CWE-005.

worker_prompt.description: CWE-class worker prompt selected in Phase 2 per REQ-CWE-004.
